AiRefineAction.description:
Level-3 LLM refinement; requires the commercial layer.

Attributes:
    provider: LLM backend identifier (e.g. ``aws_bedrock``).
    model: Provider model identifier.
    params: Optional provider-specific string parameters.
AiRefineAction.title: AiRefineAction

FakeAction.description:
Replace the value with a deterministic synthetic from ``provider``.

Attributes:
    provider: Name of the registered fake provider (e.g. ``first_name``).
    seed_alias: Optional shared seed key so two columns (e.g. an FK and its
        referenced column) fake to the same value across tables.
    params: Optional provider-specific string parameters.
FakeAction.title: FakeAction

HashAction.description: Replace the value with a salted, deterministic hash.
HashAction.title: HashAction

NerMaskAction.description:
Mask named entities found by the Level-2 SpaCy NER model.

Attributes:
    entities: Entity labels to mask. Defaults to ``PERSON``, ``ORG``,
        ``GPE``, ``LOC``.
NerMaskAction.title: NerMaskAction

NullAction.description: Write SQL ``NULL``; rejected during pre-flight on ``NOT NULL`` columns.
NullAction.title: NullAction

PassthroughAction.description: Copy the value unchanged into the target.
PassthroughAction.title: PassthroughAction

RegexMaskAction.description:
Substitute matches of ``pattern`` with ``replace``.

Attributes:
    pattern: A Python-compatible regular expression. Validated at parse
        time; a non-compilable pattern fails config validation (exit 3).
    replace: The replacement string.
    flags: Optional list of regex flag names (e.g. ``IGNORECASE``).
RegexMaskAction.title: RegexMaskAction

StaticAction.description: Replace every value with a single constant ``value``.
StaticAction.title: StaticAction

TableConfig.description:
Per-table masking configuration.

Attributes:
    strategy: How the table is handled in the target. ``transform``
        (default) masks and copies rows; ``exclude`` drops the table;
        ``empty`` recreates it with no rows; ``truncate`` empties an
        existing target table before copy.
    columns: Mapping of column name to its masking action.
    batch_size: Optional per-table override of the global batch size.
    null_orphan_fks: When true, FK columns that lose their referent are
        set to NULL instead of failing the load.
TableConfig.title: TableConfig

description:
Root mask-rules.yaml document.

Attributes:
    version: Config schema version. The MVP engine accepts ``"1.0"`` only.
    global_salt: Optional salt literal or secret URI; resolved at run time
        by the secrets resolver. Never logged.
    on_existing_data: Target-table collision policy. ``append`` is rejected
        in the MVP.
    strict_autodetect: Fail the run when auto-detect finds uncovered PII.
    replicate_all_indexes: Replicate every source index, not just unique
        and primary-key indexes.
    batch_size: Default streaming batch size in rows.
    audit_log: Write the per-run audit log to ``_privaci.audit_log``.
    auto_detect: Run the zero-config PII column scanner.
    implied_fk_ignore: Source column paths (``schema.table.column``) whose
        implied (soft) foreign-key warnings should be silenced.
    tables: Mapping of table identifier to its configuration.
title: Config
